shipping.storePickupDescription: Pick up your order from our store (Free)
shipping.deliveryDescription: We will deliver your order to your address
shipping.deliverySpeedHint: Express delivery adds a surcharge to the quoted shipping amount.
shipping.deliveryTypesHint: Standard and Express are types of the same “Delivery” option (speed and price differ)—not a separate shipping method next to pickup.
shipping.standardDeliveryDescription: Via our service or partners (typically 1–3 business days).
shipping.expressDeliveryDescription: Available for an additional fee depending on address and order contents.

deliveryPolicy.title: Delivery & supply terms (summary)
deliveryPolicy.lead: We commit to fulfilling your order quickly, safely, and conveniently. Below are the main terms that apply when you place an order.
deliveryPolicy.timeframesBody: Orders are usually delivered within 1–3 business days depending on stock and address. If there is a delay, our team will contact you in advance.
deliveryPolicy.optionStandard: Standard delivery through our service or partners.
deliveryPolicy.optionExpress: Express delivery for an additional fee (select above).
deliveryPolicy.optionPickup: Self pick-up when available for your order.
deliveryPolicy.feesFreeAbove: Orders of AMD 8,000 or more may qualify for free delivery (after discounts on the subtotal).
deliveryPolicy.feesYerevanBelow: Below AMD 8,000, standard delivery within Yerevan is AMD 1,000 unless configured otherwise in admin.
deliveryPolicy.feesRegions: Regions: price is calculated separately based on address and carrier terms.
deliveryPolicy.confirmationBody: After checkout we may contact you to confirm details, address, payment, and stock. Phones and electronics may require extra verification.
deliveryPolicy.inspectionItems: Please check packaging, condition, model/color/storage, contents, and IMEI/serial (if applicable). Report issues immediately to the courier and us.
deliveryPolicy.delaysBody: Weather, transport, holidays, warehouse issues, or inaccurate address/contact data may cause delays. We will notify you and reschedule as quickly as possible.
deliveryPolicy.specialNote: Provide an accurate phone number and address—incorrect data may extend delivery times.

legal.bundleDeliveryAndInspection: I have read and agree to the delivery and supply terms summarized above (including timelines, fees, delays, and special notes). I understand I must inspect the package and product at delivery and immediately report damage, wrong items, or other issues.
legal.bundleVerificationAndReturns: I allow the team to contact me (including by phone) to confirm my order and agree to additional verification when required (especially for electronics). I understand returns and exchanges are governed by the Return & Exchange Policy.
legal.deliverySupplyTerms: I have read and agree to the delivery/supply terms summarized above (including timelines, fees, delays, and special notes).
legal.inspectionAtDelivery: I understand I should inspect the parcel and product at delivery and immediately report damage, wrong items, or other issues.
legal.orderVerification: I allow the team to contact me (including by phone) to confirm the order, and I agree to additional verification when required (especially for electronics).
legal.returnsPolicy: I understand returns and exchanges are governed by the Return & Exchange Policy.

errors.deliverySupplyTerms: You must accept the delivery terms
errors.inspectionAtDelivery: You must acknowledge the inspection requirement
errors.orderVerification: You must accept the confirmation process
errors.returnsPolicy: You must accept the returns policy

payment.cashOnDeliveryDescription: Pay cash when you receive your order
payment.idramDescription: Pay with Idram wallet or card
payment.enterCardDetails: Enter your card details to complete payment

summary.totalPendingShippingNote: Total excludes regional shipping until confirmed by our team.
summary.deliveryPricingHint: Orders {threshold} or more: standard delivery may be free. Below that: {yerevanFee} within Yerevan. Regional delivery is priced separately by address.

modals.loginRequiredMessage: Please log in or register to place your order.

messages.cashOnDeliveryInfo: Cash on Delivery: You will pay cash when you receive your order. Card details are not required.
messages.cashOnDeliveryPickup: Cash on Delivery: You will pay cash when you pick up your order. Card details are not required.
messages.storePickupInfo: Store Pickup: You will pick up your order from our store. Delivery is free.

errors.postalCodeRequired: Postal code is required for delivery
errors.phoneRequiredDelivery: Phone number is required for delivery
errors.fillShippingAddress: Please fill in all shipping address fields
errors.failedToCreateOrder: Failed to create order. Please try again.
errors.invalidPromoCode: Promo code can contain only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
errors.regionalQuoteRequired: Shipping to this address is quoted separately. Please contact us to complete your order.
